title: Minient
description: A Clientmodpack with all important Mods Inside
body:
All Clientside mods You need to join a Server or Play a singleplayerworld!

This modpack adds mods like Xaeros Maps, Mousetweaks or Sodium and Iris to optimize your Minecraft-experience!!!
Also it has a lot of performancemods inside so it should run as smooth as Vanilla, but with great additions in it!!!


This mods are included in your Pack:

AppleSkin – Displays additional food information (e.g., saturation). 
Better Statistics Schreen - Cleans up the Statistics-Screen
CameraUtils – Provides advanced camera settings. 
Chest Tracker – Helps track inventory items stored in chests. 
Client Sort – Allows sorting of inventories. 
Collective – A library mod required for various other mods. 
Cubes without Borders - allows a new type of screen mode, accessable in the Videosettings, to have a fullscreen wich stays open if you clic on another window on multiple desktops and can remove Discord/OBS Screensharing/recordingissues. 
Dynamic FPS – Reduces FPS when the game is running in the background. 
Distant Horizons - More View distance with less GPU-Usage. 
Extreme Sound Muffler – Allows selective muting of certain sounds. 
Foggy Pale Garden – Adjusts game atmosphere (likely visual effects and sounds). 
Freecam – Enables a spectator-like mode for free movement. 
Full Brightness Toggle – Lets you enable full brightness. 
Frostbytes Improved Inventory - Makes your inv Better. 
Iris – Adds shader support to Minecraft. 
Jade – Displays information about blocks and entities. 
kennytvs-epic-force-close-loading-screen-mod-for-fabric - Less loading screen time for Creating/joining worlds, Resourcepackloading, serverjoining and much more! 
Litematica – Allows saving and placing of building schematics. 
Malilib – A library mod required for Litematica and other mods. 
MiniHUD – Displays additional HUD information (coordinates, lighting, etc.). 
Mod Menu – Adds a menu to manage installed mods. 
Mouse Tweaks – Improves inventory management controls. 
Numeral Ping - Shows your Ping instead of connection beams. 
Roughly Enough Items (REI) – Displays recipes and items (alternative to JEI). 
Resourcify - allows to install Mods, Resource/datapacks, shaders and worlds while ingame. 
Skin Layers – Improves the display of player skins. 
Sodium – A high-performance rendering engine for better FPS. 
Shulkerbox Tooltip - Shows whats inside a Shulkerbox in your Inv.  
Trade Cycling – Allows easier cycling of villager trades.
Via Fabric - Allows to switch versions while Ingame (you might be kicked caused to Anticheat on servers after switching). 
Where Is It – Helps quickly locate items in inventory. 
Xaero’s Minimap – Adds a minimap to the game. 
Xaero’s World Map – Adds an expandable world map. 
YACL (Yet Another Config Lib) – A configuration library for mods. 
YDMs Weapon Master - Shows your equip at your Back. 
YDMs MobHealthBar - Shows how much health mobs have. 
Axiom - Easier building in Creative
Boat Item View - Let you see Maps while riding a Boat
Bundles Beyond - Shows you all items in a bundle instead of only a few
ChatCalc - Lets you Calculate in your chat
Command Keys - Send Commands via Hotkeys
Controlling - Better view about your Keybinds
Do a Barrel Roll - More fun with Elytras!!!
Flashback - Easy way to record your World
Here n there - type here in the chat and press tab to enter your Location
Lithium - Free Performance
Scribble - Nicer Book design

Not any of this mods are included in any Version!!!
